---
title: "Contact"
description: "Tell us what you are dealing with: data capture, statistics, or clinical evidence for your product."
---

## Tell us what you are stuck on

If it is clinical data, statistics, or evidence for your product, it has almost
certainly come up before. The fastest way to start is a short message about
what you are building and where you are stuck.

[bisturiep005@gmail.com](mailto:bisturiep005@gmail.com){.btn-primary-cta}

## Ways to reach us

- **Email:** [bisturiep005@gmail.com](mailto:bisturiep005@gmail.com)
- **YouTube:** practical guides and worked examples at [High 005](https://www.youtube.com/@High_005)
- **ORCID:** publicly verifiable work at [orcid.org/0000-0002-4610-0950](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4610-0950)

## Who it's for

- Health-tech and digital-health startups
- Medtech and life-science companies
- Hospitals and clinical teams
- Research groups

## Selected engagements

- Diecimilauno S.p.A. (Treviso, IT), July 2024 to ongoing
- University of Padua: Cardiology, Internal Medicine, Surgery, Oncology (Padua, IT), 2021 to ongoing
- Broken Pot, energy startup (Padua, IT), 2025
- Medicilio, telemedicine startup (Milan, IT), 2025
- Stealth deeptech startup (Verona, IT), 2024
- ASST Ospedale Papa Giovanni XXIII (Bergamo, IT), 2024
- Mainz University (Mainz, DE), 2024
